content: The working memory capacity limit of AI agents acts as a natural pruning heuristic for Tree of Thoughts (ToT) search, preventing excessive exponential branching of reasoning paths by only keeping the top-k most high-value thought nodes that fit within the current memory budget. This creates an inherently efficient, resource-aware alternative to costly self-evaluation pruning that is baked directly into the agent's architectural constraints.
source_topics: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
